authors: Zehao Xiao, Shilin Yan, Jack Hong, Jiayin Cai, Xiaolong Jiang, Yao Hu, Jiayi Shen, Qi (Cheems) Wang, Cees Snoek

authors: Zehao Xiao, Cees Snoek

authors: Jiayi Shen, Qi (Cheems) Wang, Zehao Xiao*, Nanne van Noord, Marcel Worring

title: Probabilistic Test-Time Generalization by Variational Neighbor-Labeling
authors: Sameer Ambekar*, Zehao Xiao*, Jiayi Shen, Xiantong Zhen, Cees Snoek
tldr: Variational neighbor labels with meta-generalization: pseudo labels as latent variables, meta-learned with variational inference and neighboring information for test-time domain generalization.

title: Any-Shift Prompting for Generalization over Distributions
authors: Zehao Xiao, Jiayi Shen, Mohammad Mahdi Derakhshani, Shengcai Liao, Cees Snoek
tldr: A general probabilistic inference framework that uses both training and test task information for prompt generation, improving generalization across distribution shifts.

title: ProtoDiff: Learning to Learn Prototypical Networks by Task-Guided Diffusion
authors: Yingjun Du, Zehao Xiao, Shengcai Liao, Cees Snoek
tldr: A task-guided diffusion model during meta-training that gradually generates prototypes for efficient class representations.

title: Energy-Based Test Sample Adaptation for Domain Generalization
authors: Zehao Xiao, Xiantong Zhen, Shengcai Liao, Cees Snoek
tldr: A discriminative energy-based model that adapts target samples to the source domain distributions for domain generalization.

title: Association Graph Learning for Multi-Task Classification with Category Shifts
authors: Jiayi Shen, Zehao Xiao, Xiantong Zhen, Cees Snoek, Marcel Worring
tldr: A new multi-task learning setting that addresses category shifts from training to test data.

title: Learning to Generalize across Domains on Single Test Samples
authors: Zehao Xiao, Xiantong Zhen, Ling Shao, Cees Snoek
tldr: A meta-learning paradigm that learns to adapt with single samples at training time, then further adapts to each single test sample at test time.

title: A Bit More Bayesian: Domain-Invariant Learning with Uncertainty
authors: Zehao Xiao*, Jiayi Shen*, Xiantong Zhen, Ling Shao, Cees Snoek
tldr: Introduces weight uncertainty via variational Bayesian inference to better explore domain-invariant learning.

title: Relational Attention Network for Crowd Counting
authors: Anran Zhang, Jiayi Shen, Zehao Xiao, Fan Zhu, Xiantong Zhen, Xianbin Cao, Ling Shao
tldr: A self-attention mechanism capturing pixel interdependence for crowd counting and density estimation.

title: Crowd Counting and Density Estimation by Trellis Encoder-Decoder Networks
authors: Xiaolong Jiang*, Zehao Xiao*, Baochang Zhang, Xiantong Zhen, Xianbin Cao, David Doermann, Ling Shao
tldr: A trellis encoder-decoder network for crowd counting that generates high-quality density maps.

title: In Defense of Single-column Networks for Crowd Counting
authors: Z Wang*, Zehao Xiao*, K Xie, Q Qiu, Xiantong Zhen, Xianbin Cao
